3286220.name: DIMAWORLD
3286220.description:
Misha is searching for Dima. He must scour a fictional world (CHECK 230 / 236 PLACES) whose landscapes vaguely resemble areas around major Eastern European cities in the early 21st century—reimagined in a humorous alternate reality.

DIMAWORLD IS:

  • Realistic visuals, cutscenes, and immersive sound design

  • A single-player open-world experience, offering several hours of gameplay packed with diverse elements: large-scale events, occurrences of natural phenomena, and unexpected encounters. You’ll interact with various physical objects and entities, robots, and weapons—purchasing and using them, and pursuing additional tasks along the way.

  • Control different vehicles, ride trains, and survive in third-person perspective, confronting humans, wild animals, robots, and even mutant monsters.

  • Immerse yourself in a fictional world with a slightly comical atmosphere of an early 21st-century alternate reality.

  • An indie open-world explorer with elements of survival, action, object searching, and an intriguing storyline.
3286220.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
